tournaments.title: Champions League Spring 2025
tournaments.description: The most prestigious esports tournament of the season returns. Compete against top-tier players from across the globe in this 128-player bracket event. Featuring live commentary, professional casting, and a prize pool that rewards the top 16 finishers. Whether you're a seasoned veteran or a rising star, this is your chance to prove yourself on the biggest stage.

tournaments.title: Valorant Invitational — Summer Series
tournaments.description: An invite-only bracket for ranked competitors who have proven themselves in the regional qualifiers. Eight teams fight through a double-elimination bracket over two weekends. Premium production quality with dedicated coaching rooms and analyst desks. All participants receive exclusive in-game cosmetics.

tournaments.title: League of Legends Clash Cup
tournaments.description: Form your squad and battle through five rounds of BO1 and BO3 matches. Open to all ranks, this tournament is perfect for teams looking to sharpen their coordination and competitive instincts. Prizes awarded to the top 4 teams. Replays and VODs available for all participants after the event.

tournaments.title: Apex Legends Open — Season 14
tournaments.description: Trio squads compete across six rounds of ranked battle royale. Points are awarded for placement and kills. The top 10 squads advance to the grand finals held two weeks after the qualifiers. This is the largest Apex tournament in the region with over $8,000 on the line.

tournaments.title: Rocket League 3v3 Championship
tournaments.description: The ultimate test of teamwork and mechanical skill. Teams of 3 compete in a Swiss-format group stage followed by single-elimination playoffs. All matches are played on official tournament servers with anti-cheat enabled. Top performers may receive invitations to the regional LAN qualifier.

tournaments.title: Dota 2 Grand Prix — Pro Division
tournaments.description: 16 of the region's finest Dota 2 squads clash in this round-robin + playoff hybrid format. Each group stage match is a BO2, with playoffs being BO3 semifinals and a BO5 grand final. Analysts and coaches may submit reports after each series for stat tracking.

tournaments.title: Fortnite Friday Frenzy
tournaments.description: Weekly solo competition open to all platforms. Each session consists of 6 games with points based on eliminations and placement. The top 50 players from weekly sessions qualify for the monthly grand final. A fast-paced, high-energy event for players of all skill levels.

tournaments.title: Overwatch 2 Showdown Series
tournaments.description: 5v5 team competition in a round-robin group stage with top teams advancing to knockout rounds. Each match follows official OWL rules and map pool. Teams must register at least 7 players to account for substitutions. Coaches and analysts may join team channels but not voice comms during matches.
